raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "SB 1074 aims to prevent the state from continuing to secretly dump Sexually Violent Predators (SVPs) in unsuspecting communities with no regard to public safety.",
    "The SAFE Act is designed to protect neighborhoods and families from dangerous sexually violent predators.",
    "Public safety is to be made the highest criterion of any potential placement of an SVP according to SB 1074.",
    "The Department of State Hospitals (DSH) will be required to approve any placements of SVPs before vendors can sign leases for placement locations.",
    "State Hospital officials have been accused of giving vendors too much freedom in targeting unsuspecting communities for SVP placements.",
    "The lack of transparency in the decision-making process surrounding the placement of SVPs fuels public distrust."
  ]
}
```
